rationale: Section 11.439 governs late applications for disabled veterans exemptions under Sections 11.131, 11.132, and 11.22. It does not reference or depend on the general residence homestead exemption amount in Section 11.13(b). No conflict.
quote: The chief appraiser shall accept and approve or deny an application for an exemption under Section 11.131 or 11.132 for the residence homestead of a disabled veteran but not the surviving spouse of the disabled veteran or Section 11.22 after the filing deadline provided by Section 11.43
_note: Rule text concerns disabled veterans exemption late-filing procedures; proposed change to §11.13(b) general homestead exemption amount is unrelated.
